revision.comment: r2.7.2+) (Robot: Adding [[fa:رده:بنیان‌گذاری‌شده‌های دهه ۱۸۷۰ (میلادی) در ژاپن]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Removing from [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
revision.text:
[[Category:redirect categories]]redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]
[[en:Category:1870s establishments in Japan]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:1870年代日本の設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات عقد 1870 في اليابان]] [[az:Category:1870-ci illərdə Yaponiyada yarananlar]] [[ckb:Category:دامەزرانەکانی دەیەی ١٨٧٠ لە ژاپۆن]] [[commons:Category:1870s establishments in Japan]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های دهه ۱۸۷۰ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:1870-ականների հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[ku:Category:Avabûnên 1870î li Japonê]] [[pt:Category:Fundações no Japão na década de 1870]] [[ru:Category:Появились в 1870-е годы в Японии]] [[simple:Category:1870s establishments in Japan]] [[tr:Category:1870'lerde Japonya'da kurulan oluşumlar]] [[vi:Category:Khởi đầu thập niên 1870 ở Nhật Bản]] [[zh:Category:1870年代日本建立]]
